title: Add a project to several portfolios
excerpt: Hi. I´d like to have the possibility to add one project to several portfolios in order to be able to have one portfolio for the company (with all projects within the company) and one portfolio per team (with all projects…

posts.author: Filurisen (Therese)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi. I´d like to have the possibility to add one project to several portfolios in order to be able to have one portfolio for the company (with all projects within the company) and one portfolio per team (with all projects related to each team).

posts.author: NikolaMastilovic (Nikola Mastilovic (SpicyTab))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

It might not be the solution you were looking for, but I think you could do that with MultiBoard Items - It would allow you to have same items accross multiple boards, so you can create unified boards where all of the item updates are synced real time
